titleZh: 新公司法：重构公司治理
titleEn: The New Company Law: Restructuring Corporate Governance
abstractZh: 从公司治理层级、法人机构设置与董事会权责安排角度解读新《公司法》，便于对照公司法条文理解实践中的适用。
abstractEn: A practitioner-oriented overview of governance restructuring under the 2024 PRC Company Law, focusing on institution design and board dynamics.
